business_summary: NVIDIA supplies accelerated computing, networking, and software platforms used by cloud, enterprise, consumer internet, and sovereign AI customers.
recent_performance: Data center revenue increased primarily from generative AI and accelerated computing demand.
growth_drivers: Networking attach as AI clusters scale
margin_analysis: Gross margin benefited from data center mix and platform pricing but may fluctuate during product transitions.
management_commentary: Management said Blackwell demand exceeded supply during the initial ramp.
bull_case: Sustained AI infrastructure demand could support data center and networking growth.
bear_case: Export controls, supply constraints, or transition costs could pressure revenue or margins.
open_questions: How quickly can supply catch up with Blackwell demand?
How durable are cloud and sovereign AI spending plans?

source_citations.label: NVIDIA FY2025 10-K, p. 42
source_citations.excerpt: Data center revenue increased primarily from demand for compute products used in generative AI and accelerated computing workloads.

limitations: Fixture memo excludes valuation and real-time market data.
